name: CluckFan99
bio: Obsessed with finding the perfect chicken burger. I've tried them all across London.

name: WingKing
bio: Professional chicken enthusiast. If it's fried, I'm eating it.

name: CrispyQueen
bio: Life's too short for bad chicken. Manchester-based, nationwide reviewer.

name: PoultryCritic
bio: Former chef turned chicken burger reviewer. I judge on crunch, juiciness, and seasoning.

name: SpiceSeeker
bio: Give me the hottest chicken burger you've got. I fear no sauce.
